history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle selfie captures a young couple in an intimate moment, their faces filling most of the frame. The man, on the left, leans his head to the side, his eyes looking forward with a soft, relaxed expression. His skin is smooth and lightly tanned, with short, dark hair. A woman's hand, with fair skin and a white-sleeved cuff visible at the bottom left, gently rests on his cheek. To the right, the woman's face is partially visible, her head tilted and wearing a dark hijab or hood that frames her face. Her eyes are open, and her lips are slightly pursed.

The background is softly blurred, suggesting an indoor setting. Above them, two warm, glowing light bulbs hang from a wooden ceiling, casting a warm, orange-toned light that bathes the scene in a cozy glow. The overall color palette is dominated by warm browns, oranges, and the neutral tones of their skin and clothing. The mood is tender, intimate, and affectionate, conveying a sense of closeness and comfort between the couple. The image has a natural, candid feel, as if captured spontaneously.
